body: Done. Added one derived-readiness evaluator used by selection, SQLite index queries, claim-time checks under lock, briefs, reports/views, and validation. Todo is backlog-only; ready tasks wait on exact blockers; done/wont_do satisfy dependencies; rejected claims leave tasks/claims/events unchanged. Added table-driven status/dependency tests, stale-selection claim coverage, index parity, report/brief/view coverage. Verified 181 tests, typecheck, Biome, rebuilt binary, Graphify update, and ledger validation with only expected waiting-task warnings.
